name: mails-bridge
description: Multi-account email access via IMAP/SMTP. Supports Gmail, Outlook, Yahoo, iCloud, AOL, Zoho, Fastmail, ProtonMail, and any custom IMAP/SMTP provider.

interface.shortDescription: Multi-account email access for any provider
interface.longDescription: Search, read, send, draft, and organize emails across Gmail, Outlook, Yahoo, iCloud, and any custom IMAP/SMTP provider. Supports unlimited accounts with auto-detection.
